import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  for tok in tokens
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if n > t
      if first
        result = "#{n}"
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{n}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
